projectDescription: PC Connect is a healthcare management SaaS dashboard for administering provider enrollments, client accounts, insurance payers, active cases, and educational resources.
keyFeatures: Role-based user management (Admin, Provider, Director, User roles)
Client management with detailed profiles (contact, business, administration, malpractice sections)
Active Incomplete Cases monitoring with real-time data tables
Insurance payers configuration and compliance rules
Plaid bank account integration for secure financial processing
Educational resources viewer with built-in document reader
Light/dark mode theming with corporate magenta color palette
publicApiSurface: AppView — main dashboard home with module navigation cards
LoginView — authentication with HIPAA disclaimer, register, and forgot-password flows
UsersManagementView — tabular user directory with inline editing, filtering, and CSV export
ClientManagementView — client directory with profile detail view (Contact, Business, Administration, Malpractice cards)
ActiveIncompleteCasesView — filterable table of active/incomplete medical cases
EducationalResourcesView — document library with multi-page reader
SettingsDrawer — app-wide settings panel for theme mode and color presets
SettingsProvider / useSettings — React context for theme mode and color preset state
ThemeProvider — MUI theme integration with custom palette, shadows, and typography
navConfig — sidebar navigation structure grouped by ADMIN, ENROLLMENT, OVERVIEW, and REPORTS
DashboardLayout — top-level shell with responsive sidebar nav and header
